info.name: Shopmonkey API
info.description: REST API (v3) for Shopmonkey shop management - Work Orders, Customers, Vehicles, Inventory/Parts, Invoices/Payments, Appointments, Employees, Locations, and Webhooks. Base URL https://api.shopmonkey.cloud/v3. Confirmed against shopmonkey.dev.
